name: ai-product-starter
description: Bootstrap a new AI-driven product repo before any code: planning docs, operating model, TDD git/PR/AI-review/release workflow, and a phased backlog.

interface.shortDescription: Plan a new product repo before any code — docs, workflow, backlog.
interface.longDescription: Use AI Product Starter when kicking off a new app, product, MVP, or side-project. It interviews you about the product, then generates planning docs (roadmap, design, architecture, data model, AI strategy, optionally monetization), an operating model, a TDD git/PR/AI-review/release workflow, and a phased execution backlog — so AI-driven execution is repeatable.
defaultPrompt: I've got an idea for a new app I want to build.
Help me set up a new repo properly before we start coding.
